metadata.description: Local dev-time marketplace for this repo. Hosts vendored upstream plugins (like Anthropic's plugin-dev toolkit) so contributors can /plugin install them without pulling from a remote marketplace.

plugins.name: plugin-dev
plugins.description: Anthropic's plugin development toolkit — skills for hooks/MCP/plugin-structure/commands/agents, the plugin-validator and skill-reviewer agents, and the /plugin-dev:create-plugin guided workflow. Vendored from github.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-official.
